description: As the Zephyr careens through the gravity storm, Sinara attacks Daisy and Deke in the loading bay. The brutal fight rages as Daisy is forced to use her powers to survive, culminating in her impaling Sinara on a piece of debris as the ship floats in zero gravity. Meanwhile, the rest of the S.H.I.E.L.D. crew struggles to maintain control of the ship and keep it airborne.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: Turn, damn it! Come on.
Kasius misses you.
May! Hit the gravity!
Aah!
If I had a stomach, the vomiting would begin now.
Thrusters?! Talk to me, Fitz!
We're not high enough yet!
This was a terrible idea! I'm sorry!
You love forcing our choices, so how does it feel to be on the other side, for once?
Any moment now, Sinara will secure the Destroyer, and you will have no choice but to surrender.
Stand down or experience death like your friend, many, many times.
You're a real piece of work, you know that?
I am a god to be feared. Humans beg to be ruled. Without me, they'd have perished long ago.
I guess you're not a New Testament guy. Vengeance and torment are tools of the Devil.
And of the weak.
You want a devil? I'll show you a Hell you cannot imagine.
You're no god, no devil! You're just a cruel, sad, little blue man. So why don't we skip to the part where I end this?
I'm not supposed to kill you. But oh, well.
I knew I was going to regret this.
Elena, spare the theatrics. You wouldn't dare such a brazen attempt, not with the lives of your precious humans dangling between us and the void.
